name: shopsphere
description: ShopSphere — E-commerce Full Stack moderno (Next.js 15 + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix web
